execution_log.reasoning: The sum of a column must be 21. The cages in column 1 are r1c1+r2c1+r3c1 (sum 14) and r4c1+r5c1 (sum 6). These cages cover five cells and sum to 20. The only remaining cell in the column, r6c1, must therefore be 21 - 20 = 1.
